metadata.description: UDP 协议: UDP is connectionless and unreliable, with only an 8-byte header. It is suitable for real-time applications and simple requests. Python code example: ```python import socket # Create a UDP socket sock = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_DGRAM) # Send data without establishing a connection message = "Hello, UDP!" server_address = ('localhost', 10000) sock.sendto(message.encode(), server_address) # Receive response (if any) data, address = sock.recvfrom(4096) print("Received: ", data.decode()) # Close the socket sock.close() ``` This code snippet demonstrates creating a UDP socket and sending/receiving data without establishing a connection, which aligns with the characteristics of UDP as described.
